channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Anniversary Update Adds Fishing, New Quests, and Several Helpful Features
item.content:encoded:
RuneScape: Dragonwilds is officially a year old, and in today’s new update, the team adds the Fishing skill, some new quests that promise some RuneScape flavor, updated Masterwork weapons, fixes, and player experience improvements. (You can auto sprint now!).

Fishing is here, along with a dozen types of fish to catch and skill up with. Once you get fishing, you’ll start by crafting a net. Well, by getting the materials to craft that net first (Flax and a Spinning Wheel). Soon, you unlock your first rod. Out of those dozen fish, if you're lucky enough to get a Pristine Fish, you can use that to craft a decorative fishing trophy that you can mount on your wall. (The team makes clear that they don’t sing,  in case you were wondering.)

With the launch of fishing, there are three skill spells: Fishing Frenzy, Infernal Rod, and Fishnado. Infernal Rod isn't you cursing your fishing rod, rather you use fiery anima and cook your catches on contact. Fishnado is, well, use the magic in the water and send the fish up in the air and into your backpack. 

While the team continues to add more skilling content, as with the rest, Fishing has a cap of 99 and a Fishing Skill Cape to craft when you get there.

This update also adds three new quests, “that channel the classic RuneScape feeling that you've been asking for” - Cook’s Assistant, Room With Garou, and Animal Magnetism. New activities are also here, including Scarecrow Scavenging (which can net you a new hat) and Buried Treasure.

You can now toggle on an auto-sprint, so you can get places faster. Other QoL improvements include no more unprovoked attacks from chickens, cows, and Kebbits, an auto-magnetize items option to pull nearby items to you, and boosted Rune Stack caps (to 9,999). Two Masterwork Weapons also get new special attacks, and there are a number of fixes and adjustments.

You can check out the anniversary video above and the patch notes to see what else is in today's big anniversary update.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/runescape-dragonwilds-anniversary-update-adds-fishing-new-quests-and-several-helpful-features-2000137862
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: AION 2 Will Launch On PC Later This Year On Steam And NCSOFT's Own Purple Platform
item.content:encoded:
NC America officially confirmed that AION 2 will be coming to PC later this year, both on Steam and the company's own Purple platform. 

The MMO, which is already out in Asia, will be hitting PC later this year in the West, with the company stating via a press release this morning that they have "invested deeply in building a version suited for global PC players." This announcement comes just a few months after former Amazon Games exec Merv Lee Kwai was named NC America's VP of Operations, which felt like a hire intended to help ramp up publishing efforts, like AION 2, here in the West. 

NC America also announced today that the servers for AION 2 will be hosted locally in each of the regions it is launching in: North and South America, Europe, and Japan, though it stopped short of detailing just exactly where those servers will be hosted in each of the regions. This does matter, as ping being as low as possible for all connected is crucial, especially in PvP settings. 

AION 2 boasts a world that is "36 times larger than the original game," which players can explore either solo or with their play groups. This includes 4-player dungeons and 8-player raids, massive Realm versus Realm fights, and much more. 

You can check out the trailer embedded above. No official release date was given just yet, but it's nice to see that the MMO is officially confirmed to be releasing sometime this year. You can wishlist it now on Steam, and the company launched a Discord channel to keep players up to date on all the news moving forward (though, you know, keep it here for that as well).



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/aion-2-will-launch-on-pc-later-this-year-on-steam-and-ncsofts-own-purple-platform-2000137861
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
